name: SemgrepSecurityScan
description: Comprehensive security scanning with Semgrep including SAST, SCA, and License compliance with configurable ticket creation and auto-fix PR capabilities
author: Fareportal

inputs.name: semgrepAppToken
inputs.label: Semgrep App Token
inputs.helpMarkDown: Your Semgrep API token. Store as a secure variable in Azure DevOps.

inputs.name: scanType
inputs.label: Scan Type
inputs.helpMarkDown: Choose between PR Scan (differential) or Full Scan

inputs.name: baselineRef
inputs.label: Baseline Reference
inputs.helpMarkDown: Git reference to use as baseline for PR scans (default: origin/master)

inputs.name: semgrepOrg
inputs.label: Semgrep Organization
inputs.helpMarkDown: Semgrep organization name (optional, will be fetched from token if not provided)

inputs.name: enableTicketCreation
inputs.label: Enable Ticket Creation
inputs.helpMarkDown: Enable creation of Azure DevOps work items for findings

inputs.name: ticketTypes
inputs.label: Ticket Types
inputs.helpMarkDown: Select which types of tickets to create

inputs.name: sastSeverities
inputs.label: SAST Severities
inputs.helpMarkDown: Select severities for SAST ticket creation

inputs.name: sastConfidences
inputs.label: SAST Confidences
inputs.helpMarkDown: Select confidence levels for SAST ticket creation

inputs.name: scaSeverities
inputs.label: SCA Severities
inputs.helpMarkDown: Select severities for SCA ticket creation

inputs.name: scaReachabilities
inputs.label: SCA Reachabilities
inputs.helpMarkDown: Select reachability types for SCA ticket creation

inputs.name: useDefaultLicenseWhitelist
inputs.label: Use Default License Whitelist
inputs.helpMarkDown: Use the default approved licenses list

inputs.name: licenseWhitelistOverride
inputs.label: Additional/Override Licenses
inputs.helpMarkDown: Additional licenses to add to whitelist (comma or newline separated). If 'Use Default License Whitelist' is false, this becomes the complete whitelist.

inputs.name: generateSummary
inputs.label: Generate Summary Report
inputs.helpMarkDown: Generate detailed summary report with vulnerability information

inputs.name: summaryDisplayMode
inputs.label: Summary Display Mode
inputs.helpMarkDown: Where to display the summary report

inputs.name: createFixPR
inputs.label: Create Fix PR
inputs.helpMarkDown: Create pull requests with auto-fixes for findings

inputs.name: fixPRBranchPrefix
inputs.label: Fix PR Branch Prefix
inputs.helpMarkDown: Prefix for branches created for fix PRs

inputs.name: groupFixPRsByType
inputs.label: Group Fix PRs by Type
inputs.helpMarkDown: Group multiple fixes into one PR per rule type (SAST, SCA, etc.)

inputs.name: deploymentId
inputs.label: Deployment ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Semgrep deployment ID (static for Fareportal: 15145)

inputs.name: iterationListCsvUrl
inputs.label: Iteration List CSV URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: URL to download iteration list CSV for sprint mapping

inputs.name: azureDevPathCsvUrl
inputs.label: Azure DevOps Path CSV URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: URL to download Azure DevOps area path mapping CSV

inputs.name: defaultIterationPath
inputs.label: Default Iteration Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fallback iteration path if CSV is unavailable

inputs.name: logLevel
inputs.label: Log Level
inputs.helpMarkDown: Logging level for the extension

inputs.name: customRuleFilters
inputs.label: Custom Rule Filters
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comma or newline-separated list of rule names to include/exclude. Use '-' prefix to exclude (e.g., '-rule.name'). Leave empty to include all rules.

inputs.name: enableMetrics
inputs.label: Enable Metrics Collection
inputs.helpMarkDown: Collect and report metrics about scan execution, ticket creation, and PR creation
